firm_name: The Law Offices of David P Shapiro
transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom — VIP Confirmation Call | David Shapiro (2026-06-09) https://fathom.video/calls/704816497

Revenue: Highly variable — $15K–$70K/month currently. Goal: $100K/month from existing case backlog (~150 active PI cases delayed due to lack of team capacity).

Firm: Solo practitioner (38 years experience), PI, criminal defense, and general law. Team is a 'C or D team' — 1 good admin, a few part-time staff, office manager currently out sick. Owner handles all operations including bill pay and after-hours intake calls (2 AM calls). Working 60–70 hours/week with ~80% of tasks delegable.

Owner DBM: Build an 'A team' to delegate ~80% of workload, freeing David to operate as CEO, focus on business development, and spend more time at his Maine home and pursue a restaurant venture. Shift from 'Chief Everything Officer' to owner/CEO.

Marketing: 100% referral-dependent. $2.99/month lead service active. LegalMatch contract (~$1.5K/month) signed but not yet active. No paid search, no LSA.

Primary pain: Overwhelmed owner, weak team, disorganized intake missing weekend PI/criminal cases, 150-case backlog capped by staffing. Not a marketing problem — an operations and team problem.

Proposal direction: Coaching or Fractional COO to build the team and systemize operations. Follow-up proposal call set for June 11 at 4 PM ET.
